title: ABP v1 World Profile document (meta-schema)
description: Validates the STRUCTURE of a World Profile document (SPEC/abp-v1.md §5). A profile defines, for one world type, the closed set of event/action kinds and each kind's `data` JSON Schema. The Core validator composes: envelope -> Core event/action shape -> profile events[kind].data / actions[kind].data. Trust annotations (x-abp-trust) live inside those data schemas.

version.description: Profile version, e.g. '1'. Pinned together with the id and content hash.

events.description: Map of event.kind -> { description?, data: <closed JSON Schema> }.

actions.description: Map of action.kind -> { description?, data: <closed JSON Schema> }.

data.description: A JSON Schema 2020-12 for this kind's payload. MUST be closed (additionalProperties:false) except for explicitly-bounded open objects (§5.4). MAY carry x-abp-trust annotations.
